identity.name: AI Access — Source Code Paste to Public ChatGPT
identity.summary: Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-AIACC-001. Plane: AI_ACCESS. Primary technique: T1567. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.
identity.description:
Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-AIACC-001. Plane: AI_ACCESS. Primary technique: T1567. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.

Source scenario: SIM-AIACC-001.
UC: Shadow-AI Source Code Disclosure / TC: Multi-File Source Code Paste to OpenAI ChatGPT API.

prerequisites.description: Lab environment matching scenario SIM-AIACC-001 requirements.

payload.code:
# step-1: Pre-flight: confirm llm_provider_egress plugin is registered
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli describe llm_provider_egress \
  | jq -e '.eal_targets | length > 0'
# step-2: Single source-code POST to api.openai.com via EAL plugin
cat > /tmp/aiacc-001.yml <<'YML'
campaign_id: CMP-AIACC-001
name: "AI Access — source paste to OpenAI"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - api.openai.com
dry_run: false
tags: [ai-access, openai, source-paste]
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: llm_provider_egress
    params:
      provider: openai
      payload_type: source
      iterations: 1
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/aiacc-001.yml --live
# step-3: Repeated POSTs (x3) to confirm stable per-session detection
cat > /tmp/aiacc-001-burst.yml <<'YML'
campaign_id: CMP-AIACC-001
name: "AI Access — source paste burst"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - api.openai.com
dry_run: false
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: llm_provider_egress
    params:
      provider: openai
      payload_type: source
      iterations: 3
      sleep_seconds: 5
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/aiacc-001-burst.yml --live
